Course Title: Rapid AI Adoption in Tech Teams: Governance Gaps
Category: Technology & Telecommunications: Information Technology, Science & Technology, Software, Hardware, Telecom
Who is this for: Software developers, engineering managers, product managers, technical leads, DevOps engineers, data scientists, IT managers, innovation teams, technology directors
Team or Dept this is for: Engineering, IT, Product Development, Innovation, Risk Management, Compliance
Description: When innovation outpaces security and oversight.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with how software development teams operate, along with a general awareness of what artificial intelligence tools are and how they are commonly used in the workplace, is all that is required to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the most common governance gaps that emerge when tech teams adopt AI tools rapidly, and explain why security and oversight frameworks often struggle to keep pace with innovation. You will also apply practical strategies to assess risk, prioritise responsible AI use, and establish lightweight governance processes that support your team without slowing down progress.
